What's going on everyone? Welcome to the sales section. What we're going to be covering in this first one is just kind of the overview of what kind of the offer is and then there'll be two videos beneath this one will be, sorry there'll be two scripts excuse me, one is a long script and one is a bulleted script. So the long script is literally spelled out what you could read to someone over the phone. The bulleted script is once you've closed 20, 30, 50, 100 plus people with the long form script you want to transition to the bulleted form so that you can probably get your sales done a little bit faster and it's really just a question framework. So it goes from being like a 14 page script to more like a like a four or five page script. Alright so that being said let's just cover the offer overall to make this more irresistible for the clients that you're going to sign up. Alright so price point is going to range depending on your sales skill level. Alright so 1000 to 3000 is going to be kind of a sweet spot here and that depends on your time but usually going to be in the like $400 a month to $600 a month range and then if you want to sell 16 weeks or you know six months or whatever right. Most people $2000 is going to be the price point that I would recommend starting out with and going at like a 16 week program so like four months okay. Fulfillment is going to be one-on-one coaching online preferably because you'll have almost a hundred percent margin that way rather than doing time for dollars in trading in person so even if you meet with them in person because they're a local you still want to sell them online training with intermittent in-person check-ins rather than actual training because the return on your time is going to be 10 times higher and you'll be able to sell most of your day rather than coaching clients hours and hours and hours every week which is why most of you are consuming this. Right the actual points that we're selling here are sustainability. Alright that's going to be the number one big domino that we're selling here is that it's not about the fact that I can give you a workout plan that'll get you to your goals it's about what workout plan is right for you that you'll stick with forever and so that might just mean walking 10 minutes a day and then going from there rather than doing some sort of you know perfect workout that you can only do for a month right and so that's going to be the major really the first belief that we're going to break. Second belief that we're going to break is nutrition same thing it's gonna have to be sustainable and then the third one is just going to be the accountability so that it has to really fit their lifestyle and that they eventually have to like it so much that they no longer need external motivation but it's actually sorry external accountability they no longer need it and instead it transforms into internal motivation. Alright and that's kind of the three pillars of this is fitness, nutrition and accountability and the accountability goes from external to internal. Alright so the guarantee sorry that the things here but the guarantee that you're going to offer and this is what makes this more sellable is that you're going to guarantee that they're going to hit their goal weight. Okay now you want to agree on a realistic goal and when you do this it seals the deal. Now mind you a guarantee can be a million different types of guarantees so something that still is very strong in the sale but doesn't really cost you very much would be a service-based guarantee and that's why having online is preferable because the cost for film is very low right and so you can say I will guarantee that you hit your goal and if you do not I will give you two months extra free of charge to hit it right or I'll give you you know whatever you want if someone signs up for a year you can say I'll give you I'll stay with you until you hit it provided you do XYZ so that might be check-ins, food log, workouts, you buy your supplements for me, you buy food for me, whatever right now ideally if you set up your business and this is beyond the scope of this training but you should set up your business so that you have multiple revenue streams and the way that we do this in our business that we teach our gym owners and the trainers who work with us is that you should have multiple revenue streams so you should have them on a supplement plan you should have them eating the meals that you want to eat and you should be getting paid on both of those things so for us the average person is getting $200 a month in commissions per client from the ancillary sales the bolt-on revenue that happens from the things that you want them to take so if you actually do have that goal and for some reason they don't hit it you're still making $200 a month from that customer even though they might not be paying you directly all right if you want to check out more about that just go to prestigelabs.com and I'm sure there's somewhere on there that says like join our team or become a sponsored athlete or something like that but prestigelabs.com is where you can go for that okay now that being said moving on you want to make sure that they do these things and that's understood it's like I can guarantee that you'll hit the goal weight but you have to like I'll commit to you if you commit to me right and that's kind of the line that you would use in that and as long as they do that they should hit the goal no matter what now if they do meet the requirements give them the extra two months of service for free and if they don't and mind you like this very rarely will happen but it'll make the sale infinitely easier because if someone actually is checking in all that stuff they're gonna hit the goal so you know make sure it's a realistic goal make sure it's something you're excited about but that you don't feel like you have to starve someone to hit because that's
